headlines.headline: IHSG Flat at 6,127 as Markets Await Fresh Catalysts
headlines.summary: Jakarta Composite Index drifts at 6,127 (-0.05%) with subdued trading on Monday. The LQ45 slipped 1.49% and IDX 30 fell 1.85%, reflecting continued caution from foreign outflow signals.

headlines.headline: Oil Markets Face Structural Headwinds Even if US-Iran De-escalate
headlines.summary: Analysts warn Strait of Hormuz shipping disruptions have caused lasting damage to oil supply chains. Recovery could take months even with a geopolitical ceasefire, keeping crude prices elevated.

headlines.headline: Government Revises Danantara Regulation — Key Points for Investors
headlines.summary: The Indonesian government issued revised implementing regulations for the Danantara sovereign wealth fund. Changes include governance provisions and operational guidelines that could affect state-owned enterprise performance.

headlines.headline: Gold Retreats from Records — Down 0.8% at $4,555/oz
headlines.summary: Gold pulled back sharply from recent highs, dropping to $4,555 as traders took profits and US equity futures held firm. Support remains strong on geopolitical hedging demand.

headlines.headline: US Stock Futures Edge Higher After May Record Close
headlines.summary: S&P 500 futures +0.26%, Dow +0.14%, Nasdaq +0.49% as markets head into June following a strong May. VIX at 15.32 (-2.67%) signals low volatility expectations.

headlines.headline: Rupiah Weakens to 17,878 per USD — Highest Level This Year
headlines.summary: USD/IDR at 17,878, nearing the 52-week high of 17,899. Minister Purbaya maintains confidence the weakening hasn't disrupted the real economy, but FX pressure persists.

ADRO.headline: ADRO Holds at 2,300 — Awaiting Renewables Pivot Clarity
ADRO.summary: Alamtri Resources flat at IDR 2,300. Key watchpoints: progress on AADI spin-off thermal coal separation and the green energy transition roadmap.

PTBA.headline: PTBA Drops 2.11% to 2,780 — Export Policy Overhang
PTBA.summary: Bukit Asam fell to IDR 2,780 despite strong Q1 earnings. The centralized commodity export policy continues to weigh on the mining sector outlook.

AADI.headline: AADI Gains 0.90% to 8,400 — Post-Spin-off Momentum
AADI.summary: Adaro Andalan Indonesia rose to IDR 8,400. The thermal coal standalone entity is finding its footing after separation from parent ADRO.

IKBI.headline: IKBI Falls 2.91% to 500 — Selling Pressure on Small Caps
IKBI.summary: Sumi Indo Kabel declined to IDR 500. Small-cap names remain vulnerable to foreign outflows. 52-week range: 360-685.

RIGS.headline: RIGS Tumbles 5.04% to 660 — Worst Decliner in Coverage
RIGS.summary: Rig Tenders Indonesia dropped sharply to IDR 660 on thin trading volume. Oil & gas sector sentiment fragile amid Strait of Hormuz concerns.

ASII.headline: ASII Slides 2.44% to 5,000 — Automotive Sector Under Stress
ASII.summary: Astra International at IDR 5,000, nearing its 52-week low of 4,400. Market share compression continues as Chinese EV competition intensifies in ASEAN.

UNTR.headline: UNTR Down 3.68% to 22,925 — Mining Machinery Weakness
UNTR.summary: United Tractors fell sharply to IDR 22,925. At 52-week low territory. The stock split denial and mining sector uncertainty add pressure.

MYOH.headline: MYOH Dips 2.09% to 1,170 — Volatile Session, Wide Range
MYOH.summary: Samindo Resources traded in a wide 1,170-1,250 range before settling at IDR 1,170. Company announced a cash dividend with ex-date June 4, 2026.

KMDS.headline: KMDS Flat at 560 — Sideways After Recent Decline
KMDS.summary: Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa unchanged at IDR 560. Trading volume light. The stock is near the lower end of its 52-week range (520-750).

SIDO.headline: SIDO Plunges 4.95% to 384 — Near 52-Week Low
SIDO.summary: Sido Muncul dropped to IDR 384 on heavy volume, approaching its 52-week low of 378. Consumer spending selectivity in health & wellness continues to hurt.

days.price_note: Prices as of May 29 close (last trading day). June 1 is a holiday (Pancasila Day). Market reopens Tuesday June 2.

headlines.headline: IHSG Naik 1.55% Selasa Dipimpin Sektor Energi
headlines.summary: IHSG rallied 1.55% to 6,222 led by the energy sector. Majority of sectoral indexes advanced, providing a respite from recent selling pressure.

headlines.headline: Depresiasi Rupiah Pojokkan IHSG — Foreign Outflow Rp19.4T Sejak Mei
headlines.summary: IHSG remains under pressure from Rupiah depreciation and massive foreign outflows totaling Rp19.4 trillion since May 2026. Defisit transaksi berjalan, USD strength, and MSCI rebalancing are key culprits.

headlines.headline: Rupiah Terpuruk ke Rp17,864/Dolar — Terlemah di Asia
headlines.summary: Rupiah continued its slide to Rp17,864 per USD, making it the weakest currency in Asia. BI continues intervention but geopolitical tension and debt servicing needs dominate.

headlines.headline: BI Batasi Beli Valas Maks US$25,000 Mulai Juni — Rupiah Menguat
headlines.summary: Bank Indonesia limits non-underlying forex purchases to US$25,000 max effective June 2026. Rupiah responded positively, gaining to Rp17,830 per USD after the announcement.

headlines.headline: Gold at $4,504/oz — Near Record Highs, Geopolitical Hedge Demand Strong
headlines.summary: Gold trading at $4,504/oz, down slightly from peaks but holding near record territory. Geopolitical tensions (US-Iran, Israel-Lebanon) and central bank buying continue underpinning demand.

headlines.headline: WGC: Permintaan Emas Indonesia Naik 47% di Q1-2026
headlines.summary: World Gold Council reports Indonesian gold demand surged 47% in Q1 2026, reflecting safe-haven buying amid Rupiah weakness and economic uncertainty.

headlines.headline: Sektor Energi Terkoreksi Dalam — Apa Nasibnya Ke Depan?
headlines.summary: IDX Energy index has corrected significantly amid external and internal pressures. Analysts debate whether this is a buying opportunity or structural decline.

headlines.headline: Emiten Anak Hashim Kerja Sama dengan Telkom
headlines.summary: An entity affiliated with Hashim Djojohadikusumo (Siti Taski's group) announced a partnership with Telkom — potentially relevant for ADRO/AADI ecosystem.

ADRO.headline: Alamtri Resources (ADRO) Bakal Buyback Saham Rp4 Triliun Mulai April 2026
ADRO.summary: ADRO plans share buyback worth up to Rp4 trillion starting April 2026. The move signals management confidence in intrinsic value and counters market weakness.

ADRO.headline: ADRO Mau Buyback Saham Rp4T, Boy Thohir Ungkap Alasannya
ADRO.summary: VP Komisaris Garibaldi 'Boy' Thohir explains the buyback rationale: undervalued stock price relative to fundamentals, and returning value to shareholders.

ADRO.headline: Pasar Menunggu Rincian Badan Ekspor Komoditas, Saham ADRO-PTBA Mendingin
ADRO.summary: Government's single-door export policy via BUMN for CPO, coal, and ferro alloy creates uncertainty. ADRO and PTBA shares cool as markets await implementation details.

ADRO.headline: ADRO Bayar Dividen Rp3.40 Triliun — Cek Rekeningnya
ADRO.summary: ADRO distributes Rp3.40 trillion in dividends. Strong dividend yield of ~10.37% at current prices, making it one of the highest-yielding IDX blue chips.

PTBA.headline: Emiten Tebar Dividen Jumbo: ITMG, UNTR, PTBA hingga ANTM
PTBA.summary: Multiple coal and mining emiten announce jumbo dividend payments for 2026, including PTBA. Strong cash flows from elevated coal prices support generous shareholder returns.

PTBA.headline: Saham ADRO-PTBA Mendingin Menunggu Rincian Badan Ekspor Komoditas
PTBA.summary: Single-door export policy uncertainty weighs on coal stocks including PTBA. Implementation details still pending from the government.

ASII.headline: Menakar Prospek Kinerja ASII dan UNTR pada 2026
ASII.summary: Kontan analysis: Pressure on coal and automotive sectors hurt ASII and UNTR performance through late 2025 and into 2026. Structural challenges from Chinese EV competition remain.

ASII.headline: 10 Saham Dividen Terbesar 2026 yang Menarik untuk Dilirik
ASII.summary: Kumparan lists top dividend stocks for 2026 — ASII features among the highest yielders, supporting long-term value thesis even amid price decline.

UNTR.headline: Menakar Prospek Kinerja ASII dan UNTR pada 2026
UNTR.summary: Kontan: Mining machinery demand softness and Agincourt license revocation continue to weigh on UNTR fundamentals. 2026 outlook cautiously negative.

UNTR.headline: Dividen Jumbo ITMG, UNTR, PTBA — Intip Besarannya
UNTR.summary: UNTR announces jumbo dividend payment for 2026, supported by retained earnings despite sector headwinds.

AADI.headline: Adaro Andalan (AADI) Siapkan Rp5T buat Buyback Saham
AADI.summary: AADI allocates Rp5 trillion for share buyback starting May 23, 2026 — larger than the initial Rp4T plan. Strong capital allocation signal.

AADI.headline: Pendapatan dan Laba Bersih AADI Menyusut di Q1-2026
AADI.summary: AADI reports weaker Q1-2026 earnings — both revenue and net income declined year-on-year. Thermal coal pricing pressure and lower volumes cited as reasons.

AADI.headline: AADI Mau Lepas Tambang Batu Bara di Australia
AADI.summary: AADI considers divesting its Australian coal mining assets, signaling strategic portfolio rationalization in response to global energy transition trends.

MYOH.headline: Emiten Afiliasi Low Tuck Kwong Samindo (MYOH) Catat Kinerja Solid Awal 2026
MYOH.summary: MYOH (Samindo Resources) reports solid operational and financial performance in early 2026, benefited by coal services demand and elevated operational volumes.

MYOH.headline: Mayora (MYOR) Catat Kenaikan Laba Bersih Jadi Rp945.58M di Q1-2026
MYOH.summary: Related: Mayora Indah (MYOR, same family group) posted Q1 net income of Rp945.58B despite lower sales — cost efficiency driving margin expansion.

SIDO.headline: Pola Konsumsi Semakin Selektif — Rekomendasi Saham Sido Muncul (SIDO)
SIDO.summary: Kontan: SIDO's Q1-2026 performance declined as consumers become more selective in spending. Jamu demand remains resilient but premium product lines underperform.

SIDO.headline: Komisaris Sido Muncul Beli 300 Ribu Saham SIDO
SIDO.summary: Komisaris Johan Hidayat purchased 300,000 SIDO shares on March 16, 2026 — insider buying signal indicating confidence in long-term value.

SIDO.headline: SIDO Terdepak dari MSCI Small Cap Index Mei 2026
SIDO.summary: SIDO was removed from the MSCI Small Cap Index in the May 2026 rebalancing, potentially triggering passive fund outflows and near-term selling pressure.

IKBI.headline: No recent material news found for IKBI (Sumi Indo Kabel) within last 7 days
IKBI.summary: IKBI remains a small-cap with limited news coverage. Stock continues to face foreign outflow pressure common to small-caps on IDX.

RIGS.headline: No recent material news found for RIGS (Rig Tenders Indonesia) within last 7 days
RIGS.summary: RIGS has no material news in the past week. Oil & gas sector remains fragile amid geopolitical tensions and supply chain concerns.

KMDS.headline: No recent material news found for KMDS (Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa) within last 7 days
KMDS.summary: KMDS has limited news coverage. The stock trades sideways near the lower end of its 52-week range with thin volume.

days.price_note: Prices as of June 2 close (most recent trading day). June 3 session in progress.
days.data_sources: Yahoo Finance, Bing News, CNBC Indonesia, Detik Finance, Liputan6, BeritaSatu, Kontan, EmitenNews, Viva, Okezone, Tribune, Forbes, Reuters, Antara

headlines.headline: IHSG Ambruk 4,11% ke 5.941 — Terendah Sejak Mei 2021
headlines.summary: IHSG ditutup turun 4,11% ke level 5.941,07 pada Rabu (3/6/2026), bahkan sempat menyentuh 5.842 — terendah sejak 31 Mei 2021 era Covid Delta. Dari puncak historis 9.134,70 (20 Jan 2026), IHSG sudah terkoreksi 34,96% dalam kurang dari 6 bulan. Purbaya menyalahkan rumor negatif domestik.

headlines.headline: Rupiah Nyaris Rp18.000/USD — Ditutup di Rp17.940
headlines.summary: Nilai tukar rupiah mencatatkan rekor terendah baru di Rp17.940/US$, mendekati level psikologis Rp18.000. Purbaya menyebut banyak rumor di pasar keuangan yang memperburuk sentimen. Moody's juga memangkas peringkat Danantara Investment Management ke Baa2 dengan prospek negatif.

headlines.headline: Harga Minyak Naik 2% — Brent +5% Minggu Ini, WTI +10%
headlines.summary: Harga minyak terus menguat karena perdamaian AS-Iran tersendat. Brent naik lebih dari 5% minggu ini dan WTI naik 10%. Ketegangan Timur Tengah terus meningkat dengan serangan Israel ke Lebanon dan rudal Iran ke negara tetangga. Trump tetap optimis tapi pasar menunggu kemajuan nyata.

headlines.headline: Purbaya: Jangan Takut, Fundamental Ekonomi Bagus — IHSG Bakal Naik Lagi
headlines.summary: Menkeu Purbaya Yudhi Sadewa meminta investor tak cemas. Ia menilai penurunan IHSG disebabkan aksi jual jangka pendek dan rumor negatif, termasuk rumor downgrade S&P. Purbaya yakin IHSG akan pulih karena fondasi ekonomi kuat, pendapatan pajak baik, dan daya beli masyarakat masih kuat.

headlines.headline: CNBC Research: Saham Konglomerasi Bertumbangan — TPIA -15%, PTRO -14,38%
headlines.summary: CNBC Indonesia research menunjukkan saham konglomerasi mengalami penurunan massal. TPIA terkoreksi -15%, PTRO -14,38%, CDIA -13,79%, BUVA -13,77%. Tiga sentimen utama: rumor downgrade S&P, Moody's pangkas rating Danantara, dan pelemahan rupiah. Rp6.000 triliun nilai pasar IHSG menguap sejak Januari.

headlines.headline: Gold di $4.485/oz — Tetap Dekat Rekor, Sentimen Geopolitik Mendukung
headlines.summary: Emas diperdagangkan di $4.485/oz (+0.41%), tetap dekat level rekor. Ketegangan geopolitik AS-Iran dan Israel-Lebanon terus mendukung permintaan safe-haven. Permintaan emas Indonesia naik 47% di Q1-2026 menurut WGC.

headlines.headline: Pupuk Indonesia Pangkas 42 Anak Usaha hingga 2027 — Transformasi BUMN
headlines.summary: PT Pupuk Indonesia akan memangkas dari 57 entitas (2025) menjadi 17 entitas (akhir 2026) dan 15 entitas (2027). Transformasi membentuk tiga Sub-Holding: Agrichemical, Industrial Chemical, dan Clean Ammonia. Bagian dari reformasi BUMN di bawah Danantara.

ADRO.headline: ADRO Anjlok 4,39% ke Rp2.180 — Terendah dalam 52-Week Range
ADRO.summary: Alamtri Resources ditutup di Rp2.180 (-4.39%), mendekati bawah range 52-minggu (1.625-2.700). Volume tinggi 111M saham vs rata-rata 87M. Tekanan jual massal sektor batu bara dan konglomerasi membayangi. Buyback Rp4T dan dividen Rp3.40T tetap menjadi penyangga fundamental.

PTBA.headline: PTBA Ambruk 5,07% ke Rp2.620 — Sektor Batu Bara Tertekan
PTBA.summary: Bukit Asam ditutup di Rp2.620 (-5.07%), terendah dalam 52-minggu (2.170-3.220). Kebijakan ekspor single-door dan pelemahan rupiah menambah tekanan. Dividen yield tinggi 12.69% tetap menarik untuk investor jangka panjang.

AADI.headline: AADI Turun 3,90% ke Rp8.000 — Koreksi Lanjutan
AADI.summary: Adaro Andalan Indonesia turun ke Rp8.000 (-3.90%). Q1-2026 menunjukkan penurunan pendapatan dan laba YoY. Buyback Rp5T tetap menjadi katalis positif. Pertimbangan divestasi aset batu bara Australia sinyal transisi energi.

ASII.headline: ASII Turun 1,22% ke Rp4.840 — Dekati 52-Week Low
ASII.summary: Astra International di Rp4.840 (-1.22%), mendekati 52-week low Rp4.400. Volume tinggi 101M saham (2x rata-rata). Persaingan EV China di ASEAN terus menekan. Dividen yield 8.06% memberikan penyangga.

UNTR.headline: UNTR Turun 2,22% ke Rp22.000 — Sektor Mining Machinery Lesu
UNTR.summary: United Tractors di Rp22.000 (-2.22%). Permintaan mesin pertambangan melambat. Dividen yield 9.96% dan jumbo dividend announcement memberikan dukungan fundamental.

MYOH.headline: MYOH Naik 1,69% ke Rp1.200 — Ex-Dividen Hari Ini
MYOH.summary: Samindo Resources naik ke Rp1.200 (+1.69%) dengan ex-dividen hari ini (4 Juni 2026). Kinerja operasional dan keuangan solid di awal 2026. Volume perdagangan meningkat.

IKBI.headline: IKBI Turun 0,99% ke Rp500 — Small-Cap Tertekan
IKBI.summary: Sumi Indo Kabel di Rp500 (-0.99%). Volume rendah 18.000 saham. Small-cap terus tertekan outflow asing. Tidak ada berita spesifik hari ini.

RIGS.headline: RIGS Turun 1,48% ke Rp665 — Sektor Oil & Gas Rapuh
RIGS.summary: Rig Tenders Indonesia di Rp665 (-1.48%). Sektor oil & gas tetap rapuh di tengah ketidakpastian geopolitik dan gangguan rantai pasok Selat Hormuz.

KMDS.headline: KMDS Ambruk 5,36% ke Rp530 — Terendah dalam 52-Week Range
KMDS.summary: Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa anjlok ke Rp530 (-5.36%), mendekati 52-week low Rp520. Volume 139.200 saham. Tidak ada berita spesifik, tertekan sentimen pasar luas.

SIDO.headline: SIDO Turun 2,08% ke Rp376 — Near 52-Week Low
SIDO.summary: Sido Muncul di Rp376 (-2.08%), mendekati 52-week low Rp366. Volume tinggi 47.5M saham (2x rata-rata). Pola konsumsi selektif dan terdepak dari MSCI Small Cap Index Mei 2026 terus menekan.

days.price_note: Prices as of June 3 close. June 4 market session in progress. IHSG -4.11%, Rupiah Rp17.940/USD.
days.data_sources: Yahoo Finance, CNBC Indonesia, Forbes, Reuters, AFP
